label: Work offline, sync when you're back
items: Notes now work fully offline — create, edit, pin, archive and delete without a connection. Everything syncs automatically the moment you're back online.
Garden layout edits made offline are saved on your device and synced when you reconnect.
You can add a one-off task while offline; it's saved and syncs on reconnect. Recurring routines and task links still need a connection.
An offline banner keeps you informed, and the account menu's "Sync now" lets you push pending changes on demand.
